hooks.command: ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(next(str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"AGENTS.md").exists() and (c/".shared").exists()))')"; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/check_bugate.py"

ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(next(str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"AGENTS.md").exists() and (c/".shared").exists()))')"; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/check_plan_lock.py"

ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(next(str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"AGENTS.md").exists() and (c/".shared").exists()))')"; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/bugate_prompt_reminder.py"
